claims.evidence_text: Our findings reveal that crops with clumped canopy architectures achieve higher yields and lower N2O emissions, a pattern consistently observed across all four major crops... This effect is possibly driven by enhanced light interception and gross primary production, along with increased canopy nitrogen demand.
claims.claim_summary: Clumped canopy architecture in wheat raises yield and lowers N2O emissions via enhanced light interception and GPP.

claims.evidence_text: crops with clumped canopy architectures achieve higher yields... driven by enhanced light interception and gross primary production
claims.claim_summary: Canopy clumping index influences light interception efficiency in wheat canopies.
